prompt: Task 59 has 13 Magic Number smells and 2 Assertion Roulette smells in JNose.

response: Extracted all input numbers (primes, composites, powers of two) and expected outputs into named static integer constants.
Resolved Assertion Roulette by splitting multiple assertions logically and appending detailed error string messages to each.
